features: NATURAL: The insoles care carefully crafted from natural leather to ensure comfort and best care for your feet.
LEATHER: The top layer of insoles is made of genuine leather natural in colour. Leather absorbs sweat and makes your feet breathe.
ACTIVATED CARBON: Underlayer is made of activated carbon foam. Activated carbon foam neutralizes odours and cushions you feet.
VARIOUS SIZES: Come in various sizes, chose the one you want from the drop-down list.
LEGACY: Crafted by a family business with over 25 years of experience in insoles manufacturing. Best for everyday shoes, casual shoes, elegant shoes and smart shoes.
